concerns.sentence: Severe sepsis [E:cond:5][E:cond:6], MSSA septicemia [E:cond:3][E:cond:4], acute respiratory [E:cond:7][E:cond:8] and kidney failure [E:cond:9][E:cond:10], ESRD [E:cond:13][E:cond:14], and CAD s/p MI [E:note:row386337:2].
concerns.reason: The summary claims 'CAD s/p MI' based on a citation that actually refers to an Ejection Fraction (EF) of 35-40%.

recommended_revisions.original: Severe sepsis [E:cond:5][E:cond:6], MSSA septicemia [E:cond:3][E:cond:4], acute respiratory [E:cond:7][E:cond:8] and kidney failure [E:cond:9][E:cond:10], ESRD [E:cond:13][E:cond:14], and CAD s/p MI [E:note:row386337:2].
recommended_revisions.suggested: Severe sepsis [E:cond:5][E:cond:6], MSSA septicemia [E:cond:3][E:cond:4], acute respiratory failure [E:cond:7][E:cond:8], acute kidney failure [E:cond:9][E:cond:10], and ESRD [E:cond:13][E:cond:14].
recommended_revisions.reason: Removed the hallucinated CAD s/p MI diagnosis and corrected the phrasing of respiratory and kidney failure to match the fact sheet.
